title: RIBOZYME F-RB-2 inter-rater agreement witness v1
description: Witness schema for F-RB-2 inter-rater reliability follow-up (G26-RB-1 / C0d-equivalent in nanobot, GATE-26-4 in umbrella). Captures Cohen's kappa across N raters scoring the same n=30 corpus that produced the suspicious-perfect 30/30 cycle-25 audit (log_bf=79.74). PASS criterion: kappa >= 0.6 (substantial agreement per Landis-Koch 1977) AND inter-rater stratified log_bf collapses below 5.0 (Jeffreys decisive ceiling). Reference: .roadmap.ribozyme G26-RB-1, .roadmap.hexa_bio §A.6 / GATE-26-4.

rater_count.description: Number of distinct raters. Minimum 2 for kappa; >= 3 recommended.

corpus_size.description: Aligned with original F-RB-2 cycle-25 corpus (n=30 hammerhead/HDV/hairpin/PTC architectures).

per_axis_kappa.description: Cohen's kappa per scoring axis. Axis names match the original F-RB-2 axes (catalytic-core / 4-state-ladder / k_cat-K_M-margin / Eigen-Hammes-ceiling).

overall_kappa.description: Pooled kappa across axes. PASS threshold >= 0.6.

stratified_log_bf.description: log10 Bayes factor recomputed under each rater's labels independently, then min/mean/max across raters. PASS: max < 5.0 (collapses below decisive ceiling, indicating prior labels were over-fit).

overall_pass.description: AND-gate: both criteria must PASS for F-RB-2-inter-rater PASS.

notes.description: Free-text audit notes. May reference raw_91 honest-C3 disclosures (e.g., rater training, rubric ambiguity).
